_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology

_contextSnippet: We successfully assembled PDX into 3D microtissues, categorized as robust (>90% viability at 48 h), good (>50%), or unusable (<50%). We evaluated drug response to 'robust' or 'good' microtissues, namely MN-2, JH-2-002, JH-2-079-c, and WU-225.
details: MN-2 MPNST cells assembled into 3D microtissues with robust viability (>90% at 48 h); ex vivo drug response tested for trabectedin, olaparib, and mirdametinib; ex vivo responses predicted in vivo responses
